query:
ALTER TABLE `users`
  ADD COLUMN `profile` ENUM('citizen','attendant','sector_server','manager','admin') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'attendant',
  ADD COLUMN `isAgent` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN `isAvailable` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN `avatarUrl` TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN `sectorId` INT NULL;
